decisions.what: Replaced Python-focused .gitignore with web development patterns
decisions.why: Specification required web development focused gitignore for HTML/CSS/JS project with node_modules, build artifacts, .env files, and IDE patterns

decisions.what: Enhanced README with comprehensive project documentation
decisions.why: Specification required setup instructions, technology stack, project structure, development guidelines, and deployment information for GitHub Pages

decisions.what: Created semantic HTML5 landing page with split-screen hero
decisions.why: Specification required semantic structure with hero, benefits, opportunity, testimonials, and contact sections following split_screen_hero design pattern

decisions.what: Implemented scroll-triggered reveal structure with data attributes
decisions.why: Design rules specified scroll_triggered_reveals pattern with 150ms stagger timing for major sections

decisions.what: Added social proof section with metrics and testimonials
decisions.why: Design rules specified social_proof_heavy pattern prominently after opportunity section with testimonial cards and success metrics

decisions.what: Implemented morphing button states in contact form
decisions.why: Design rules specified morphing_button_interactions for all CTAs with loading spinners and success checkmark animations

decisions.what: Used Unsplash photography URLs for hero and content imagery
decisions.why: Design rules specified photography_centric approach with high-quality images of rotation crop farming and sustainable agriculture

decisions.what: Structured contact form with skeleton loading states
decisions.why: Design rules specified skeleton_loading for form submission states to improve perceived performance

decisions.what: Added comprehensive ARIA labels and accessibility attributes
decisions.why: Specification required proper ARIA labels and accessibility attributes throughout semantic HTML5 structure

decisions.what: Linked external stylesheet and script files with relative paths
decisions.why: Specification required links to styles/base.css, components.css, animations.css, responsive.css and scripts/main.js, animations.js, form.js, utils.js
